what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG icon depicting 3D coordinate axes with x, y, and z text labels and a dashed base guide.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with viewBox 0 0 24 24 and explicit 24px width and height.
Sets fill to none and uses currentColor for stroked paths and text fill.
Draws three axis lines meeting near the center at coordinate 12,12.
Includes lowercase x, y, and z labels as SVG text elements using DM Sans fallback sans-serif.
Adds a dashed path near the lower-left/base area using stroke-dasharray.
standouts: Combines stroked line geometry with live SVG text labels.
Represents 3D orientation through labeled axes and a dashed projection/base guide.
conventions: Follows a line-icon convention with round stroke caps and joins.
Uses currentColor for themeable icon color.
Uses embedded text rather than path outlines for axis labels.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are present for accessible labeling.
Text rendering depends on font availability and SVG text behavior.
notes: A compact themeable SVG icon for labeled 3D axes.
questions: Should the text labels remain live SVG text or be converted to paths for consistent rendering?
Should the icon include accessible metadata?
Is the dashed lower path intended as a projection guide, ground plane, or decorative depth cue?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename implies a 3D axes icon, and the SVG draws labeled x, y, and z axes with a dashed base guide.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a compact icon for 3D coordinate, axis, or spatial-reference concepts.
novelty: The icon mixes live text axis labels with simple stroked geometry inside a small 24px line-icon format.
contribution: Contributes a compact x/y/z coordinate-axis glyph with currentColor theming, fixed 24px sizing, and a dashed depth cue for systems that need a visual marker for 3D spatial reference.
summary_for_embedding: A 24px themeable SVG line icon showing labeled x, y, and z 3D axes with a dashed base/projection guide.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for representing 3D coordinate axes as a reusable design-system icon.
